prompt: Task 129 has 12 Magic Numbers and 1 Assertion Roulette smell in JNose.
Refactor the tests to eliminate the smells by extracting all hardcoded arrays into private static final constants and adding descriptive messages to assertEquals.
response: Extracted all int[] inputs (mixed signs, all positive, all negative, empty) and their expected integer results into descriptive constants.
Appended custom error messages to every assertion to ensure the Assertion Roulette smell is cleared.
interactions.notes: Code smell cleared. Handled the data type difference where Gemini expects int[] while Claude expects List<Integer> by isolating constant definitions.
